ground_truth.title: New and Upcoming Books, Seasonal Book Listings | Publishers Weekly
ground_truth.main_content: Publishers Weekly Previews section featuring upcoming book releases and announcements. The page includes featured articles and recently posted previews across various categories including Adult Previews with Spring 2026 Fiction & Nonfiction previews spanning Science Fiction/Fantasy/Horror, Science, Romance & Erotica, Politics & Current Events, Poetry, Mysteries & Thrillers, Memoirs & Biographies, Literary Fiction, Lifestyle, and History. Featured articles include Adult Books for Spring 2026 by David Adams highlighting game-changing histories and high-voltage romantasies, Personal Finance Books for Today's Economy by Liz Scheier helping readers navigate changing financial picture, Books for At-Home Entertaining featuring new books on hosting and party planning, Cocktail Books for All Types of Drinkers covering low- and no-booze options, and Mysteries & Thrillers in Translation showcasing international crime fiction.
with: Authors speak the universal language of crime fiction.
Space exploration, debates over AI, and stories of wildlife resilience headline this season's science titles.
Government malfeasance, the consequences of too much tech, and the emotional lives of medical caregivers are spotlighted in spring's current affairs titles.
Our editors have sifted through thousands of submissions to bring you the season's most notable new releases, from game-changing histories to high-voltage romantasies.
Alongside collections confronting political upheaval and technological acceleration are works that celebrate place, art, and the enduring power of literature.
